description: Inject deterministic guidance when conditions match.
purpose: Loads pre-scripted guidance into the brain's `triggered` section based on hard-coded rules over field values. Reach for this when you know exactly what the talker / thinker should be told under a specific condition — e.g. 'when intent equals complaint, follow this de-escalation script'. The hard alternative to KB: KB is similarity-search guessing, this is deterministic if-this-then-that. Place upstream of the Thinker / Talker (or whichever addon consumes its output). Each rule has conditions (AND-of-clauses, same vocabulary as Transition Router) and a `contextText`. Matched rules write their text to `triggered.<domain>.<field>` — downstream addons read via `triggeredReads`, mirroring how they read memory / thinking. No LLM call. Multiple Triggered Context loaders can coexist with different domains for orthogonal rule sets.
